name: §2.27 successor --read validates parent_session_id exists in the §2.15 workflow-state envelope; refuses if absent
command: H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --write --session-id child --parent-session-id missing-parent --parent-cl-id c --current-phase F --context-summary mid --next-action go --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && mkdir -p ws && printf '%s' '{"_concurrent":true,"sessions":{"other-session":{}}}' > ws/state.json && H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art H13_WORKFLOW_STATE=ws/state.json bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --read --session-id child 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'not active' err.txt && echo refused 1>&2
